summary: Completed testing of Admin Tracking features (Approved By/Rejected By) and RD system enhancements. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Features verified: admin tracking fields for Bank Redeem and RD Redeem, date range filters and sorting for admin panels, weekly limit MongoDB query fix.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Bank Redeem approve (line 589-592): Correctly saves approved_by_name, processed_by, processed_by_uid after fetching admin user details
✅ Bank Redeem reject (line 659-662): Correctly saves rejected_by_name, processed_by, processed_by_uid
✅ RD Redeem approve (line 1315-1317): Correctly saves approved_by_name, processed_by, processed_by_uid
✅ RD Redeem reject (line 1412-1414): Correctly saves rejected_by_name, processed_by, processed_by_uid
✅ Weekly limit fix: RD redeem uses MongoDB query with $gte for date comparison (lines 456, 469, 483) instead of Python string comparison
✅ Date filters: Both /api/admin/bank-redeem/requests and /api/rd/admin/redeem-requests support date_from, date_to, sort_order params
✅ Frontend AdminBankWithdrawals.js (lines 615-624, 685-702): Correctly displays 'Approved By' or 'Rejected By' with admin name
seed_data_creation: Reused existing test user from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin tracking features fully implemented. Bank Redeem and RD Redeem approve/reject endpoints save: approved_by_name/rejected_by_name, processed_by (admin name), processed_by_uid (admin UID), processed_at. Date filters work for both admin list APIs. Weekly limit uses proper MongoDB $gte query for date comparison.

admin_tracking_bank_redeem.reject: Saves rejected_by_name, processed_by, processed_by_uid, processed_at, rejection_reason

admin_tracking_rd_redeem.approve: Saves approved_by_name, processed_by, processed_by_uid, processed_at, transaction_ref

features_verified.weekly_limit_fix: RD withdraw checks use MongoDB {created_at: {$gte: week_start_str}} instead of Python string comparison
features_verified.frontend_display: AdminBankWithdrawals.js shows 'Approved By: {name}' or 'Rejected By: {name}' in request details
